title: The Slice Spectral Sequence of a 𝐶₄-Equivariant Height-4 Lubin–Tate Theory
author_string: Hill, Michael, Shi, XiaoLin, Wang, Guozhen, Xu, Zhouli
journal: Memoirs of the American Mathematical Society
